cities.name: Riverside
cities.tagline: A welcoming neighborhood with room to grow.
cities.description: Bella Vista begins beside the river, where family traffic is dependable, leases are forgiving, and a hungry lunch crowd rewards steady operators.

strategic_traits.label: Family favorite
strategic_traits.description: Reliable family demand softens slow service periods.

strategic_traits.label: Moderate rent
strategic_traits.description: Starter locations are affordable enough for early expansion.

cities.name: Harbor Quarter
cities.tagline: Fast streets, fickle visitors, and no quiet shifts.
cities.description: Tourists, dock crews, and tight delivery windows turn the harbor into a test of speed. Higher rents are offset by dense demand and lucrative evening trade.

strategic_traits.label: Tourist surges
strategic_traits.description: Demand rises quickly around harbor events and evening arrivals.

strategic_traits.label: Dense delivery grid
strategic_traits.description: Short routes make a delivery-focused operation viable.

strategic_traits.label: High rent
strategic_traits.description: Every branch needs healthy daily profit to stay afloat.

cities.name: Bella Heights
cities.tagline: The city watches every price, plate, and promise.
cities.description: An affluent hill district where reputation travels fast. Premium rents, entrenched rivals, inspectors, and award judges make this the campaign's defining test.

strategic_traits.label: Premium demand
strategic_traits.description: Guests will pay more, but expect a celebrated brand.

strategic_traits.label: Public scrutiny
strategic_traits.description: Price changes and operational failures damage reputation quickly.

strategic_traits.label: Award circuit
strategic_traits.description: Citywide competitions can turn strong service into lasting fame.

unlock_requirement.description: Complete Rush at the Docks in Harbor Quarter.
